text:
I understand — your $500 ACH deposit from 4 business days ago hasn't reflected in your balance yet, even though it's past the 1-3 business day window you saw. I can't confirm from here whether it failed or is just delayed in processing.

I'm passing this to our payments team to look into. It would help to have the last 4 digits of the bank account used and the approximate time you initiated the deposit — a human will follow up with you.

Novig Support
